overall.description: First-person exploration of a lavish art deco interior from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring dramatic golden stained glass with a deer motif, opulent furnishings, and atmospheric neon lighting. The camera moves through a grand lobby, explores a darker side corridor with discarded items, and returns to the illuminated main hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand art deco lobby with illuminated stained glass centerpiece

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal ornate ceiling architecture and hanging chandeliers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the illuminated stained glass window at the end of the lobby, admiring the architecture

entered.detail: massive illuminated art deco window featuring a deer silhouette with golden yellow lighting
polished marble flooring with circular geometric patterns reflecting the golden light
long red carpet runner leading toward the stained glass window
ornate golden chandeliers hanging from the high ceiling
vertical art deco light fixtures mounted on the lobby walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a magnificent art deco lobby with a massive golden stained glass window dominating the far wall. The camera moves forward across polished marble floors following a red carpet, then tilts up to reveal ornate chandeliers and the towering ceiling architecture. The space is empty of people, emphasizing the opulent, cinematic atmosphere of the game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: side seating area with discarded items and dim atmospheric lighting

events.description: turns right from the bright main lobby into a darker side area with seating furniture
ambient light drops significantly as camera moves deeper into the shadowed corridor

agents.ego_description: turning right into a dimly lit seating area, moving past discarded bottles and trash on tables

entered.detail: modern orange upholstered sofa with dark wooden frame
glass coffee table littered with empty bottles, cans, and food containers indicating recent occupancy
dark wood or stone wall panels with geometric art deco patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right from the grand lobby into a darker, more intimate side area furnished with an orange sofa and littered coffee tables. The lighting shifts from bright golden to dim and moody as the camera moves past discarded items, suggesting a neglected or recently vacated space. The stained glass window remains visible on the left edge before disappearing as the camera ventures deeper into the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor leading back to main lobby

events.description: turns left to navigate back toward the main lobby area
golden light from the stained glass window becomes visible again as camera approaches the main hall

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow dark corridor and turning back toward the illuminated main lobby, ascending a slight ramp

entered.detail: concrete ramp or stairs leading upward toward the main lobby level
the illuminated deer motif window becomes visible again as the camera returns
upper level balconies with golden railings overlooking the lobby

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with cracked marble floors and vertical wall lights, then turns left to ascend a ramp back toward the main lobby. The golden stained glass window gradually comes back into view, transitioning the scene from dark shadows back to the warm, opulent lighting of the grand hall, revealing the art deco balconies and ceiling architecture once more.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lavish art deco lobby that dips into a neglected side corridor before returning to the grand, illuminated hall. It begins by gliding across polished marble floors and a red carpet toward a massive golden stained glass window, tilting upward to reveal ornate chandeliers and towering ceiling architecture. As the camera turns right, the bright golden light shifts to a dim, moody atmosphere, moving past an orange sofa and littered coffee tables in a secluded area. The scene then transitions into a narrow, dimly lit corridor with cracked floors and vertical wall lights before turning left to ascend a ramp. Finally, the golden stained glass window gradually reappears, pulling the camera out of the shadows and back into the warm, opulent glow of the main lobby and its sweeping balconies.
